outlines.title: The Letter
outlines.logline: Mira reopens the case after finding a sealed letter.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira finds a sealed letter hidden under her door.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan over the hidden archive letter.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira chooses action instead of silence.
outlines.cliffhanger: The letter points to a second file in the archive.

outlines.title: Archive Before Dawn
outlines.logline: Rowan tries to hide the evidence before Mira can reach it.
outlines.opening_hook: Rowan slips into the archive before dawn.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must expose Rowan before the archive evidence disappears.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira realizes Rowan is afraid of the truth.
outlines.cliffhanger: A torn label reveals another storage room.

outlines.title: Pier Confession
outlines.logline: Mira corners Rowan at the pier and records his confession.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira waits at the pier with the recorder already running.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan before he can destroy the recording.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira hears the confession she risked everything to capture.
outlines.cliffhanger: Rowan says the real order came from someone above him.

outlines.title: Second File
outlines.logline: The archive clue leads Mira to a file Rowan thought was gone.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira opens the storage room and finds a clean file mark.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must fight Rowan's cover story with the second file.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira confirms the case was never closed.
outlines.cliffhanger: The file lists Mira's family as witnesses.

outlines.title: Witness List
outlines.logline: Mira discovers that her family was tied to the hidden case.
outlines.opening_hook: A witness list places Mira's family inside the old case.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must confront Rowan while protecting the witness list.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira understands why the letter was sent to her.
outlines.cliffhanger: One witness is marked as still alive.

outlines.title: Still Alive
outlines.logline: Mira follows the surviving witness before Rowan reaches them.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira spots the living witness leaving the pier road.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must protect the witness against Rowan's pressure.
outlines.cliffhanger: The witness names a hidden archive account.

outlines.title: Hidden Account
outlines.logline: The hidden account links Rowan to the case cover-up.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira logs into the hidden archive account.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must reveal Rowan's account before he deletes it.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira sees the first proof that can hold.
outlines.cliffhanger: A scheduled deletion begins counting down.

outlines.title: Countdown
outlines.logline: Mira races the deletion clock while Rowan closes in.
outlines.opening_hook: The archive clock starts deleting the evidence file.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must stop Rowan and save the archive proof.
outlines.cliffhanger: The saved file opens to a confession transcript.

outlines.title: Transcript
outlines.logline: The transcript exposes what Rowan hid and why.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira reads the confession transcript aloud.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must force Rowan to answer for the transcript.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira finally hears the truth in Rowan's own words.
outlines.cliffhanger: The transcript names a final unseen handler.

outlines.title: The Handler
outlines.logline: Mira uses Rowan's confession to pursue the unseen handler.
outlines.opening_hook: Mira plays Rowan's confession where the handler can hear it.
outlines.main_conflict: Mira must confront the handler without losing Rowan's proof.
outlines.emotional_payoff: Mira turns a private case into public leverage.
outlines.cliffhanger: The handler replies with Mira's real family name.
